meta.race_name: Fairlight Studios Conditional Jockeys' Handicap Hurdle

rankings.name: Captain Cool
key_positive_factors: Fits the profile of a consistent Class 5 performer
key_risks: Top end of his handicap mark

rankings.name: Cosmic Soul
key_positive_factors: William Maggs is an elite conditional at this level
key_risks: Needs to prove he can handle the specific undulations of Sedgefield

rankings.name: Blackwater Lilly
key_positive_factors: Highest OR in the race suggesting class edge
Brian Ellison often targets these local Go North qualifiers
key_risks: Carrying top weight on potentially testing 'Good to Soft' ground

rankings.name: Lahire
key_positive_factors: Donald McCain stable is a dominant force at Sedgefield
key_risks: Inconsistent jumping in similar handicap hurdles

rankings.name: Newport
key_positive_factors: Iain Jardine yard showing good form with hurdlers
Rian Corcoran takes off useful weight
key_risks: Often finds one or two too good at the finish

rankings.name: King Kodiak
key_positive_factors: Stamina won't be an issue at this trip
key_risks: Lower OR suggests he may lack the basic speed of the principals

rankings.name: Warrior Lion
key_positive_factors: Second string from Candlish yard can sometimes surprise
key_risks: Recent form suggests a significant decline in ability

rankings.name: Jet Approach
key_positive_factors: Ellison stable capable of finding improvement
key_risks: Massive step up in performance required to figure

rankings.name: Susiesparkle
